summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fase 1B Configuration Consumption. All backend APIs (28/28 tests) passed successfully. Frontend displays pricing breakdowns, payment terms, and PO details correctly. Dynamic approval workflows (SO/PO) working as designed with threshold-based and role-based authorization.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/sales-orders with item discount 10% + order discount 5% + NET30 term + PKP entity → correct pricing math (subtotal=1.85M, discount=268K, net=1.58M, PPN=174K, grand=1.76M)
Backend: GET /api/settings/compute-tax?entity_id=ent_ksc → PKP entity returns 11% PPN (1M → 1.11M)
Backend: GET /api/settings/compute-tax?entity_id=ent_kanda → Non-PKP entity returns 0% PPN (1M → 1M)
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders with qty=300 (55.5M) → approval_required=true, required_approval_role=manager
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders/{id}/submit-for-approval (large SO) → status=waiting_approval
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders/{id}/approve as SALES role → 403 Forbidden (correct)
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders/{id}/approve as MANAGER role → status=approved (correct)
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders with qty=10 (1.85M) → approval_required=false
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders/{id}/submit-for-approval (small SO) → status=approved (auto-approve)
Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders with qty=700 (129.5M) → status=waiting_approval, approval_required=true, required_role=manager
Backend: GET /api/purchase-orders/{id} (before approval) → inbound_tasks count = 0
Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders/{id}/approve as MANAGER → status=pending, approval_status=approved
Backend: GET /api/purchase-orders/{id} (after approval) → inbound_tasks count > 0 (created automatically)
Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders with qty=50 (9.25M) → status=pending (no approval), inbound_tasks created immediately
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders/{id}/simulate-payment → invoice includes full tax breakdown (total_amount, discount_total, net_subtotal, dpp, ppn_rate, ppn_amount, grand_total, payment_term_name)
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders after payment → payment_status=paid
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders → 200 OK, no ObjectId regression errors
Backend: GET /api/sales-orders/stats/summary → 200 OK, returns total_orders, total_reserved_qty
Backend: GET /api/dashboard → 200 OK, returns products, available, reserved, active_orders, warehouses
Frontend: Login as admin@kainnusantara.id successful
Frontend: Dashboard loaded with metrics row visible
Frontend: Navigate to Orders view successful
Frontend: Orders view displays order list with 11 orders
Frontend: Order detail panel shows pricing breakdown (Subtotal, Diskon, DPP, PPN, Grand Total)
Frontend: Order grand total displayed correctly (Rp 2.053.500)
Frontend: Navigate to Purchasing view successful
Frontend: PO Management panel loaded with 8 POs
Frontend: PO detail panel displays supplier, warehouse, items, total amount

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI views and data display working correctly)
